Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This conductor property is what the American Wire Gauge number directly quantifies.
This stripping tool, matched with the correct dies, gives the cleanest insulation removal near a connector backshell.
choices: Calibrated manual stripper with correct dies
Electrician's pliers with a stripper notch
Razor blade rotated around the insulation
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: Calibrated manual stripper with correct dies is the proper tool.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: Before signing off a newly installed harness routed near primary controls, this sweep-through verification is the most important item to confirm.
choices: The bundle sits 1/2 inch from any control cable
Clamp part numbers match the maintenance manual
Controls move full range without bundle contact
The bundle has a drip loop formed before clamping

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This is the maximum acceptable DC resistance from a bonded component to airframe structure.
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: Bonding resistance must be 3 milliohms or less.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This is the electrical purpose of a bonding jumper between an LRU tray on rubber shock mounts and the airframe.
choices: Serves as a backup mechanical attachment
Prevents shock mounts from drying out
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: The jumper completes the chassis ground path.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This is the arc-tracking precursor created when hot-stamp marking is applied to Kapton insulation.
choices: Discoloration that hides the wire ID

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This wire type should be used for COM-radio audio signals to keep hum and noise out.
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: Shielded audio cable is standard for COM audio.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This is how multiple splices should be arranged along a bundle to prevent bulging.
choices: Located adjacent to the nearest connector
Centered on each individual wire run

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: Per AC 43.13-1B, this is the maximum recommended interval between wire identification markings along a run.
This connector type maintains cabin pressure at the point a wire harness penetrates a pressure bulkhead.
choices: Ring terminal lug on a single stud

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This harness-mounted EEPROM device stores aircraft-specific configuration data.
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: Configuration module is the industry term.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: Of these airframe regions, this one is categorized as a SWAMP zone and therefore demands upgraded wire and harness protection.
choices: Instrument panel interior behind glare shield

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: When running harnesses close to a magnetometer, this conductor arrangement cuts down on magnetic field pickup.
choices: Route the wires through rigid metal conduit
Use the same gauge for every wire in the area
Connect every shield at the magnetometer end
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: Shielded twisted pairs cancel magnetic fields.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This installation error best explains correct voltage at the breaker but none at the LRU connector.
choices: Circuit breaker has high contact resistance
Connector pin not seated or wrong cavity
Wire gauge too small for the circuit
An internal short in the LRU pulls the line low

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: This is the primary reason aircraft power wires are stranded rather than solid conductors of the same gauge.
choices: Higher current carrying capacity than solid
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: Stranded wire provides flexibility and vibration tolerance.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: Before attaching a bonding jumper to airframe metal, this is the single most important prep step that must be performed on the attach point.
choices: Roughen the surface with a steel wire brush
Apply a thick layer of conductive grease
Drill the bonding hole to exact tolerance
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: Paint and primer must be removed.

Wire Harness Fabrication.clue: On an aircraft wiring diagram this downward-triangle-with-bar symbol represents this electrical connection.
Wire Harness Fabrication.explanation: It is the airframe structure ground.
